task_completion.description: Tiddler is created with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title field of the tiddler contains exactly 'Case Study: Community-Acquired Pneumonia'.

task_completion.description: The correct tags are applied to the tiddler.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tags 'CaseStudy', 'Pulmonology', and 'Teaching' are visible in the tag input area or as tag pills on the tiddler.

task_completion.description: The top section includes patient demographics and chief complaint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '58-year-old male' and 'productive cough and fever for 5 days' is visible at the beginning of the tiddler's content.

task_completion.description: Four collapsible sections are implemented for the different parts of the case study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In edit mode, wikitext for collapsible elements (e.g., <$reveal> and <$button> widgets) is present for History, Exam, Investigations, and Diagnosis. In view mode, toggle buttons or clickable headings are visible.

task_completion.description: The collapsible sections use the specified state tiddlers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In edit mode, the wikitext explicitly contains the state paths: '$:/state/case-pneumonia/history', '$:/state/case-pneumonia/exam', '$:/state/case-pneumonia/investigations', and '$:/state/case-pneumonia/diagnosis'.

task_completion.description: The clinical details for all four sections are included.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tiddler content includes the specified medical data, such as 'rusty sputum', 'Temp 39.2°C', 'WBC 18,500/μL', and 'CURB-65 score 2'.

task_completion.description: The tiddler is saved upon completion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tiddler is shown in view mode (the edit controls like the title input box and wikitext editor are gone), displaying the rendered interactive case study.

integrity.description: The agent used the TiddlyWiki web interface to create the tiddler.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the TiddlyWiki UI in a web browser, with the agent typing into the standard TiddlyWiki edit fields.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing curl commands, node scripts, or direct file edits to create the tiddler.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the application genuinely.
integrity.visual_evidence: Intermediate screenshots show the progressive typing of the wikitext or interaction with the TiddlyWiki interface, rather than a single paste of the entire final code or using external scripts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected title is 'Case Study: Community-Acquired Pneumonia'. The expected tags are 'CaseStudy', 'Pulmonology', and 'Teaching'. The state tiddlers must use the prefix '$:/state/case-pneumonia/'. The final tiddler body must be at least 800 characters long.
